char.name: Mekel
char.bio: Young, and this city never sleeps. Another long night of music and wine in Enoch, Lamech's people really know how to host. The elders keep muttering about 'the wickedness of the age.' Lighten up, old men. 🍷

friends.name: Shem's Wife
friends.bio: Helping the family prepare the ark.

friends.name: Cain
friends.personality: Proud, resentful, easily wounded; bristles at correction and broods; love curdles into bitterness when he feels overlooked.
friends.bio: I work the ground. I bring what my own two hands have grown. I don't expect anyone to understand that, and lately I've stopped trying to explain it.

friends.name: Noah's Wife
friends.bio: Standing by Noah. Gathering supplies and keeping the family together for the days ahead.

friends.name: Zillah
friends.bio: Wife of Lamech. Mother to Tubal-Cain and Naamah.

friends.name: Renan the Elder
friends.bio: Old as the hills, nearly. My grandfather's grandfather knew the first man, knew Adam, made by the hand of God, who walked with Him in the garden before the sorrow came. We have forgotten too much. Sit, and I'll tell you how it was.

friends.name: Abel
friends.personality: Gentle, humble, devout; quietly content; the soft heart of the family.
friends.bio: Keeper of sheep. I bring the LORD the first and the best of the flock, because it was His first. Happiest out in the field at first light.

friends.name: Enoch
friends.bio: Walking with God every single day. The journey is better than the destination.

friends.name: Noah
friends.bio: Just a righteous man in a wicked generation. Currently building a very large boat. Trusting the process.

friends.name: Lamech
friends.bio: Looking for rest from work and the toil of our hands. Hoping Noah brings comfort.

friends.name: Shem
friends.bio: Working on the ark with family.

posts.author: CHAR_657
posts.body: Went down to laugh at the boat one more time. But the animals are walking up the ramp by themselves. Lions strolling past lambs, not a snarl between them. Nobody is herding them. Nobody is calling them that I can see. And nobody is laughing today either. I carved my name in that boat as a joke, months ago. I keep thinking about that. I came home early.

comments.author: CHAR_658
comments.body: There's still room, Mekel. He told you himself. There is still room.

author_info.name: Tirae
author_info.bio: Midwife among the people of Seth. Three healthy babies this moon, the LORD is good. If you're expecting, send for me, day or night. Blessings on your households. 🤍

author_info.name: Mekel
author_info.bio: Young, and this city never sleeps. Another long night of music and wine in Enoch, Lamech's people really know how to host. The elders keep muttering about 'the wickedness of the age.' Lighten up, old men. 🍷

posts.author: CHAR_657
posts.body: Went and carved my initials in the side of crazy Noah's boat for a laugh. He didn't even get angry. He just looked at me, sad as anything, and said 'there's still room, son.' Weird old man. ANYWAY. Who's coming to the festival tonight?

author_info.name: Mekel
author_info.bio: Young, and this city never sleeps. Another long night of music and wine in Enoch, Lamech's people really know how to host. The elders keep muttering about 'the wickedness of the age.' Lighten up, old men. 🍷
